narrative: Medium-impact BES Cyber System at substation control house. CIP-002 categorization complete. Baseline configuration documented per CIP-010 R1.1. ESP defined with EAPs through firewall (deny-by-default). PSP with monitored badge access; visitor log retention 90 days. Patches evaluated within 35 days per CIP-007 R2; current month patches all within window or with mitigation plans. Incident response plan tested 8 months ago. Recovery plan tested 12 months ago. Personnel risk assessments current. No removable media unscanned. DPA designated.
